description_long: This is a pair of aviator-style sunglasses featuring large, teardrop-shaped lenses set within a thin, metallic full-rim frame. The lenses are dark and opaque, providing significant coverage and a classic, timeless look. The bridge is a double-bar design, with a prominent top bar connecting the two lenses above the nose area. The temples are slender and straight, extending back with a slight downward curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The overall construction appears lightweight yet sturdy, with minimal embellishments and a focus on sleek, functional design. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a clean and utilitarian aesthetic.
description: Aviator-style sunglasses with dark, teardrop lenses in a thin, metallic full-rim frame and double-bar bridge. The temples are slim and unadorned, giving a sleek, classic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large, dark teardrop lenses, double-bar bridge, and full-rim frame, highlighting the classic aviator shape.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin, straight temples and the slight curve at the ends, as well as the minimal thickness of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the open, unobstructed lens backs and the symmetrical alignment of the temples, emphasizing the frame's slim profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the straight, slender temple and the thinness of the frame from a lateral perspective.
attribute_frame_design: The frame has a classic aviator geometry with large, teardrop-shaped lenses and a thin, full-rim structure. The frame is lightweight, with a double-bar bridge and straight, slender temples that curve slightly at the ends. There are no visible embellishments or decorative features.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark, nearly opaque, with a uniform black or dark gray tint. There is no visible gradient, mirroring, or special effect; the tint appears solid and consistent across both lenses.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a double-bar design, with a prominent upper bar and a lower bar connecting the lenses above the nose. The structure is straight and minimal, providing both support and a distinctive aviator look.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin, straight, and unadorned, with a slight downward curve at the ends for comfort. There are no visible patterns, engravings, or embellishments, giving the temples a clean and simple appearance.
